result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script:

1. Loaded all 9 tab-delimited datasets from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged all datasets by NSID using full_join
3. Created detailed adolescent variables (hownteen14-20) with 8 categories plus missing value codes
4. Created collapsed harmonized variables (hown14-20, hown25, hown32) with consistent categories
5. Applied standard missing value codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Script error, -1=Not applicable)
6. Applied descriptive labels to all variables
7. Selected only the required variables (NSID, collapsed variables, and detailed adolescent variables)
8. Wrote the cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv

Output file contains 16,111 rows and 17 columns:
- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- hown14, hown15, hown16, hown17, hown18, hown19, hown20, hown25, hown32 (collapsed tenure variables)
- hownteen14, hownteen15, hownteen16, hownteen17, hownteen18, hownteen19, hownteen20 (detailed adolescent variables)
